# ErgoActive – Copilot Workspace Overview

ErgoActive is a native Win32 C++ desktop application that monitors keyboard and mouse activity and reminds the user to take regular breaks. It is a single Visual Studio project built from `ErgoActive.sln`.

## Project

| Project | Output | Purpose |
|---------|--------|---------|
| `src/ergoactive.vcxproj` | `ergoactive{32\|64}[d].exe` | Main GUI application |

Input activity is detected via the Win32 `GetLastInputInfo` API — no separate hook DLL is required.

## Key Source Files

Files follow a naming convention: `data-*` for data/logic, `ui-*` for presentation.

### Data layer (`data-*`)
- **data-usage.h** – `usage_data` class; rolling-window activity tracker with micro-break detection, 20-20-20 rule support, and urgency levels.
- **data-daily.h** – `daily_stats` class; persists per-day usage statistics (active time, break count, longest stretch, ergonomic score) to `%APPDATA%\ergo-active\history.csv`.

### UI layer (`ui-*`)
- **ui.h** – GDI drawing helpers and RAII wrappers: `scoped_delete_object`, `scoped_select_object`, `buffered_paint_surface`, `rect_f` floating-point rectangle, `font_spec` font descriptor, color blending, DPI-aware font/text/shape drawing, and the `draw_usage_graph` free function for rendering the activity graph.
- **ui-frame.h** – `main_frame` class; owns the dark-themed dashboard UI with stat cards, activity graph, delay slider, system tray icon with color-coded urgency, break/eye-strain reminders, posture tips, and daily history integration.
- **ui-task-bar-icon.h** – `task_bar_icon` class; system tray icon management with dynamic color-coded urgency icons (green/yellow/red), context menu, balloon tips, tooltip updates, and `TaskbarCreated` restart recovery.

### Infrastructure
- **main.cpp** – `wWinMain` entry point; creates the main frame window and runs the Win32 message loop. Also contains the exit/hide dialog procedure.
- **win.h** – Precompiled/common header; sets up Unicode, Win32 target version macros, includes Windows & C++ standard library headers
- **resource.h** – Resource identifier constants generated by Visual Studio for icons, menus, dialogs, string table entries, and control commands.
- **ergoactive.rc** – Resource script (icons, menus, dialogs, version info, string table).
- **res/ErgoActive.exe.manifest** – Application manifest enabling PerMonitorV2 DPI awareness, common controls v6, and Windows 10/11 compatibility.

## Build

- Solution: `ErgoActive.sln` (Visual Studio / MSBuild).
- Platform toolset: **v145**; C++ standard: **C++20**.
- Configurations: `Debug|Release` × `Win32|x64`.
- Default task: **Build Debug x64** — runs MSBuild with `Debug|x64`.
- Outputs land in `Exe/`.

## Conventions

- Header-only style for most app code; implementation lives in `.h` files.
- Dark color scheme constants defined in `main_frame` (`BackgroundColor`, `SurfaceColor`, `AccentColor`, `TextColor`, `DimTextColor`, `GraphBorderColor`, `GreenColor`, `YellowColor`, `RedColor`).
- Per-monitor DPI awareness (PerMonitorV2) via app manifest; runtime DPI helpers in `ui.h`.
- Delay setting persisted in `HKCU\Software\ErgoActiv`.
- Activity polling uses `GetLastInputInfo` on a 10-second timer tick (`60s / TimerGap`).
- Daily usage history persisted as CSV in `%APPDATA%\ErgoActiv\history.csv`.
- 20-20-20 eye reminder fires every 20 minutes of continuous activity.
- Posture tips rotate through balloon notifications on each break warning.
- Tray icon dynamically changes color: green (OK) → yellow (approaching limit) → red (overdue).
